title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
This new product is specially designed for the business community and aims to provide a range of benefits and opportunities for IDBI customers. It is mandated to issue only Business Card to current account holder.
  * Simply wave/tap the card on the contactless Point of Sale (PoS) and pay without entering PIN for purchases upto Rs. 5000.


IDBI Bank VISA Business Debit Card offers 2 free visits per calendar quarter at participating Airport lounge in India. For List of participating Lounge please visit 
You can use your IDBI Bank VISA Business Debit Card on the Internet for buying travel or movie tickets, paying your bills and much more.
IDBI Bank VISA Business Debit Cardholder will get 2 loyalty points for every 100 spent at Merchant locations. 
_#Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant categories is subject to revision from time to time._
In addition to insurance cover for lost/stolen/Counterfeit cards, you can avail of following insurance covers:

_Please keep your card active to continue enjoying seamless transactions and benefits._  
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As VISA Business Debit Card is issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.keywords: Visa Debit Card, Debit Card, Business Debit Card
